features.name: chained concatenation assignments triggering optimizer hang
features.description: Code should include multiple concatenation assignments chained together that cause the concatMergeable optimizer function to infinitely recurse

features.name: concatenation with duplicate subexpressions in OR expression
features.description: Code should include concatenation operations with duplicate subexpressions appearing in an OR expression that triggers the ifMergeAdjacent infinite recursion

extraction_summary.notes: Issue has no inline code blocks; test case was in GitHub attachment (t_concat_or.v.txt). Features synthesized based on backtrace analysis showing concatMergeable infinite recursion in V3Const.cpp optimizer.
